name: Chicken Broccoli Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups cooked corkscrew or medium shell macaroni
1 large red or green pepper, coarsely chopped
1 1/2 cups prepared reduced fat ranch salad dressing
1 1/2 cups Fat Free Toasted Garlic & Onion Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss macaroni, broccoli, chicken, and pepper in a bowl until evenly coated with the dressing.
2. Just before serving, toss the macaroni mixture with croutons.
3. Serves 6.
